chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.D-1428 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A. 73/2024 3. For hearing of main case 03.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, AAG Mr. Muhammad Hashim Bajeer Advocate files power on behalf of petitioners, which is taken on record. Grievance of the petitioner is that his application is pending before Respondent No.2 Secretary, Works and Services Department having office at Sindh Secretariat Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner states that the Petitioner will be satisfied if the said application is ordered to be decided at the earliest. Learned AAG waives notice and recorded his no objection. In view of above, this Petition is disposed of along with listed application, with direction to the Secretary, Works and Services Department having office at Sindh Secretariat Karachi to decide the Petitioner’s Application pending before him by giving patient hearing to the Petitioner and pass an speaking Order in accordance with law within two months. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
